calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-16-2020 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Continued To Mar-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard concurrently:
PES-19-303279 The Estate of Sally Christine Owensby.
PES-19-303358 The Estate of Sally Christine Owensby.

Appearances:
William Remery for Petitioner Timothy P. Breen via Court Call.
Glenn Moss for and with Petitioner Nancy Barfield.
Stacie Nelson for American Red Cross.

The Court announced the competing petitions filed in different case numbers. Mr. Moss stated he had problems when he tried to file with both case numbers, that the Trustee sale scheduled for tomorrow will be postponed due to reinstatement. The Court stated Mr. Moss is to submit the proposed order for the matters to be consolidated with PES-19-303279 being the lead case. The Court noted Mr. Moss's proposed order to extend Letters for Special Administration provided in open court does not look like he used the correct format, and will be reviewed after the order for consolidation is filed so all future filings will be in PES-19-303279. Mr. Remery stated he waives approval as to form for the proposed orders for consolidation as well as to extend special administration. Mr. Moss to submit a hard copy of the proposed order with Ms. Nelson's approval as to form to the court on Feb. 04, 2020.

Timothy Breen's Petition for Letters of Adminstration filed in PES-19-303279 and Nancy Barfield's Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed filed in PES-19-303358 are continued to March 16, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
